integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with OpenProject.

integrity.description: Verify the widgets were configured through the actual OpenProject UI.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard configuration was actually applied to the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the configured dashboard in its normal viewing state, indicating the layout changes were saved, rather than just floating in an unapplied edit menu.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user login is 'bob.smith'. The expected widgets correspond to internal identifiers 'work_packages_assigned' and 'time_entries_current_user'. Note: The exact UI name for the time widget is 'My spent time', which contradicts the task description's claim of 'Spent time'.
